name: DW · Dim Supplier
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS supplier_id,
    'SUP-' || lpad(gs::text, 4, '0')                                           AS supplier_code,
    (ARRAY['Acme','Globex','Initech','Umbrella','Stark','Wayne','Oscorp','Hooli','Soylent','Tyrell'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('SNM'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 10)]
        || ' ' ||
    (ARRAY['Industries','Supply Co','Logistics','Partners','Holdings'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('SSUF'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 5)]   AS supplier_name,
    (ARRAY['USA','China','Germany','Mexico','India','Vietnam'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('SCNTRY'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 6)] AS country,
    (ARRAY['Net 30','Net 45','Net 60','Prepaid'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('STERM'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 4)]  AS payment_terms,
    round((( ('x'||substr(md5('SRATE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 300)/100.0 + 2)::numeric, 2) AS quality_rating, -- 2.00-5.00
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('SLEAD'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 45)       AS lead_time_days,
    (ARRAY['Active','Active','Active','Inactive'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('SSTAT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 4)]  AS status
FROM generate_series(1, 150) AS gs
